Name: Voice Note Confessionals
How It Works: Press Bee button when urge hits. Speak: 'GK Log: urge at [time], intensity [1-10], triggered by [cause].' Creates timestamped urge data.

Name: Daily Insights Scoreboard
How It Works: Bee surfaces emotional patterns and recurring themes. Track how often gambling-related language appears. Declining frequency = GK momentum proof.

Name: Accountability Auto-Summary
How It Works: Wear Bee during check-ins with accountability partner. Bee auto-summarizes commitments made.

Name: GK Daily Report Template
How It Works: Custom 'Gegenkraft Daily Report' template: Urges resisted (count), Replacement actions taken, Money saved, GK power level (1-10).

Name: Trigger Geo-Fencing
How It Works: Set topic boundaries around gambling language. If gambling topics appear in Bee themes, flag and activate counter-move.

Name: Auto-Save the Bet Money
How It Works: Say 'I just resisted a $50 bet' and Bee drafts email/reminder to transfer that amount to savings.

Name: GK Boss Battles
Points Awarded: Double points on boss battle days
How It Works: API extension pulls daily urge logs, calculates GK Power Score, flags 'boss battle' days (3+ urges), awards double points if survived clean.

Name: Morning Declarations
How It Works: Each morning press button and state: 'Day X. No gambling today. GK power level: [1-10].' Verbal contract timestamped. x1.5 multiplier after 7 days, x2 after 30.

Name: Relationship Pattern Tracking
How It Works: Bee tracks relationship shifts over time. Monitor if gambling conversations with friends decrease. Quantified social change.

Name: Weekly GK Retrospective
How It Works: Review Bee's weekly summaries. Count wins, flag weakest trigger points, set next week's GK targets.
